{{Infobox madra
| name = Twin Stars
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Twin Stars]] is a type of [[madra]] [[Lindon]] uses.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can forge constructs out of his [[Twin Stars]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Twin Stars]] wipes away the spirit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Twin Stars]] is a title used to address [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“I’m pleased to know that I’m still allowed to approach you, Twin Stars,” Charity said.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
